PowerShell($conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 2567 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conns\) { $pids = $conns.OwningProcess | Select-Object -Unique; foreach \($p in $pids\) { Write-Output "Stopping PID $p"; Stop-Process -Id $p -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } } else { Write-Output "Никто не слушает 2567" }; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; $still = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 2567 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($still\) { Write-Output "ВСЁ ЕЩЁ слушается" } else { Write-Output "Порт 2567 свободен" })

PowerShell($conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 2567 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conns\) { \($conns.OwningProcess | Select-Object -Unique\) | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output "stopped $_" } }; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 600; if \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 2567 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\) { "still up" } else { "2567 free" })
